languages.text: "Вы правильно поступили. Чтобы выжить, порой нужно принимать непростые решения".

traits.locale_text: "Вы правильно поступили. Чтобы выжить, порой нужно принимать непростые решения".
"Вы правильно поступили. Чтобы выжить, порой нужно принимать непростые решения".

languages.text: "You did the right thing. Sometimes one has to make difficult decisions to survive."
languages.original_text: "Вы правильно поступили. Чтобы выжить, порой нужно принимать непростые решения".

traits.locale_text: "You did the right thing. Sometimes one has to make difficult decisions to survive."
"You did the right thing. Sometimes one has to make difficult decisions to survive."
"You did the right thing. Sometimes one has to make difficult decisions to survive."

languages.text: "Du hast das Richtige getan. Manchmal muss man schwierige Entscheidungen treffen, um zu überleben."
languages.original_text: "You did the right thing. Sometimes one has to make difficult decisions to survive."

languages.text: "Vous avez fait ce qu'il fallait. Parfois, il faut prendre des décisions difficiles pour survivre."
languages.original_text: "You did the right thing. Sometimes one has to make difficult decisions to survive."

languages.text: "你做得对有时候，为了生存，人必须做出艰难的决定。"
languages.original_text: "You did the right thing. Sometimes one has to make difficult decisions to survive."

languages.text: "Hiciste lo correcto. A veces hay que tomar decisiones difíciles para sobrevivir".
languages.original_text: "You did the right thing. Sometimes one has to make difficult decisions to survive."

languages.text: 「あなたは正しいことをした。生きていくためには、難しい決断をしなければならないこともある"
languages.original_text: "You did the right thing. Sometimes one has to make difficult decisions to survive."

languages.text: "Sen doğru olanı yaptın. Bazen hayatta kalmak için zor kararlar almak gerekir."
languages.original_text: "You did the right thing. Sometimes one has to make difficult decisions to survive."
